bugs.error_message: RSI example backtest shows impossible PnL (-$21M on $10k balance)
bugs.root_cause: Position sizing for FIXED_FRACTION was returning units instead of lots, causing PnL calculation to be 100,000x larger than intended.
bugs.fix: Divided unit size by 100,000 in _calculate_lot_size to return standard lots.

bugs.error_message: Login button freezes indefinitely when Supabase auth request has no network response (DNS timeout domain)
bugs.root_cause: Supabase JS SDK has no request timeout for signInWithPassword. When the email domain causes DNS to hang (e.g. notareal.domain), the loading=true state never resolves, leaving the button permanently disabled with no error shown.
bugs.fix: Known issue — no fix applied yet. Workaround: use real email domains. Long-term fix: wrap supabase.auth.signInWithPassword in a Promise.race with a 15s AbortController timeout.

bugs.error_message: Supabase project requires email confirmation — new signups get confirmation_sent_at but no session. E2E tests cannot authenticate programmatically.
bugs.root_cause: The Supabase project (pmwlukvixofqqjehlokj) has email confirmation enabled. signUp returns a user object but no access_token, so onAuthStateChange never fires a SIGNED_IN event and app stays on login screen.
bugs.fix: For E2E testing: temporarily bypass login guard in App.tsx (if (false && !session)) or disable email confirmation in Supabase Auth settings for the test project.

bugs.error_message: Dashboard shows $0.00 for all account metrics (balance, equity, P&L) — no real broker connection
bugs.root_cause: No broker API credentials configured (OANDA/Alpaca). App uses paper trading mode with simulation feed. Data feed shows 'Disconnected' in System Health. Account data is empty until credentials are set in Settings.
bugs.fix: Expected state for unconfigured demo. User must configure API keys in Settings > MT5 / Broker Connection to see real data.

bugs.error_message: System Health shows 'Incident' status — Data Feed is Disconnected, Broker API shows 'Not configured'
bugs.root_cause: No data feed or broker credentials configured. dataFeedService defaults to 'simulation' but simulation only starts when a user session is present and data_feed_configs table has a row. Without auth, feed stays disconnected.
bugs.fix: Configure OANDA or Alpaca credentials in Settings and save. The feed will auto-connect. Also: Broker API warning is expected until API keys are entered.

bugs.error_message: Backtesting uses synthetic/simulated candle data instead of real OANDA historical data
bugs.root_cause: No OANDA credentials set, so fetchHistoricalCandles returns empty array. Code falls back to generateHistoricalCandles which creates synthetic price data. This produces unreliable backtest results.
bugs.fix: Configure OANDA API credentials in Settings. The backtest will then pull real H1 historical candles. Warning banner is correctly shown when synthetic data is used.

bugs.root_cause: eodhd: 'bg-sky-500/20 text-sky-300', → { bg: 'bg-sky-500/10 border-sky-500/30', badge: 'bg-sky-500/20 text-sky-300'; tiingo: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300', → { bg: 'bg-purple-500/10 border-purple-500/30', badge: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300'; synthetic: 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300', → { bg: 'bg-amber-500/10 border-amber-500/30', badge: 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300'
bugs.fix: Changed eodhd: 'bg-sky-500/20 text-sky-300', → { bg: 'bg-sky-500/10 border-sky-500/30', badge: 'bg-sky-500/20 text-sky-300'; tiingo: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300', → { bg: 'bg-purple-500/10 border-purple-500/30', badge: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300'; synthetic: 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300', → { bg: 'bg-amber-500/10 border-amber-500/30', badge: 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300'

bugs.root_cause: Had `inline-block px-2.5 py-1 rounded text-xs font-sem
bugs.fix: Changed to `inline-block px-2.5 py-1 rounded text-xs font-sem
